result.stdout:
Description:
  cicee

Usage:
  cicee [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  env       Commands which interact with the current environment.
  exec      Execute a command in a containerized execution environment.
  init      Initialize project. Creates suggested CICEE files.
  lib       Gets the path of the CICEE shell script library. Intended to be used as the target of 'source', i.e., 'source "$(cicee lib --shell bash)"'.
  meta      Commands interacting with project metadata.
  template  Commands working with project continuous integration templates.

commands.payload:
Description:
  cicee

Usage:
  cicee [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  env       Commands which interact with the current environment.
  exec      Execute a command in a containerized execution environment.
  init      Initialize project. Creates suggested CICEE files.
  lib       Gets the path of the CICEE shell script library. Intended to be used as the target of 'source', i.e., 'source "$(cicee lib --shell bash)"'.
  meta      Commands interacting with project metadata.
  template  Commands working with project continuous integration templates.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands which interact with the current environment.

Usage:
  cicee env [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  require  Require that the environment contains all required variables.
  display  Display values of current project CI environment variables.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Execute a command in a containerized execution environment.

Usage:
  cicee exec [options]

Options:
  -p, --project-root <project-root> (REQUIRED)  Project repository root directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e]
  -c, --command <command>                       Execution command
  -e, --entrypoint <entrypoint>                 Execution entrypoint
  -i, --image <image>                           Execution image. Overrides $PROJECT_ROOT/ci/Dockerfile.
  -h, --harness <Direct|Script>                 Invocation harness. Determines if CICEE directly invokes Docker commands or uses a shell script to invoke Docker commands. [default: Direct]
  -v, --verbosity <Normal|Quiet|Verbose>        Execution progress verbosity. Only applicable when using 'Direct' harness. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  cicee exec [options]

Options:
  -p, --project-root <project-root> (REQUIRED)  Project repository root directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e]
  -c, --command <command>                       Execution command
  -e, --entrypoint <entrypoint>                 Execution entrypoint
  -i, --image <image>                           Execution image. Overrides $PROJECT_ROOT/ci/Dockerfile.
  -h, --harness <Direct|Script>                 Invocation harness. Determines if CICEE directly invokes Docker commands or uses a shell script to invoke Docker commands. [default: Direct]
  -v, --verbosity <Normal|Quiet|Verbose>        Execution progress verbosity. Only applicable when using 'Direct' harness. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize project. Creates suggested CICEE files.

Usage:
  cicee init [command] [options]

Options:
  -p, --project-root <project-root> (REQUIRED)  Project repository root directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e]
  -i, --image <image>                           Base CI image for $PROJECT_ROOT/ci/Dockerfile.
  -f, --force                                   Force writing files. Overwrites files which already exist. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information

Commands:
  repository  Initialize project repository. Creates suggested CICEE files and continuous integration scripts. Optionally includes CICEE CI library.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize project repository. Creates suggested CICEE files and continuous integration scripts. Optionally includes CICEE CI library.

Usage:
  cicee init repository [options]

Options:
  -p, --project-root <project-root> (REQUIRED)  Project repository root directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e]
  -i, --image <image>                           Base CI image for $PROJECT_ROOT/ci/Dockerfile.
  -f, --force                                   Force writing files. Overwrites files which already exist. [default: False]
  -l, --ci-lib                                  Initialize project CI with CICEE execution library. Supports 'cicee exec'-like behavior without CICEE installation. [default: False]
  -s, --shell <Bash>                            Shell template. [default: Bash]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Gets the path of the CICEE shell script library. Intended to be used as the target of 'source', i.e., 'source "$(cicee lib --shell bash)"'.

Usage:
  cicee lib [command] [options]

Options:
  -s, --shell <Bash>  Shell template. [default: Bash]
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information

Commands:
  exec  Execute a command within a shell which has the CICEE CI shell library (/tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e/tool/.store/cicee/2.0.0/cicee/2.0.0/tools/net10.0/any/lib) and is initialized for the project environment.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Increments version in project metadata.

Usage:
  cicee meta version bump [options]

Options:
  -m, --metadata <metadata> (REQUIRED)            Project metadata file path. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e/project-metadata.json]
  -d, --dry-run                                   Execute a 'dry run', i.e., skip writing files and similar destructive steps. [default: False]
  -i, --increment <Major|Minor|Patch> (REQUIRED)  SemVer increment by which to modify version. E.g., 'Minor' would bump 2.3.1 to 2.4.0. [default: Minor]
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information

  -p, --project-root <project-root> (REQUIRED)  Project repository root directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-cicee-2.0.0-b8b4734ed6b24b1289859e1d50fd168e]
  -s, --shell <Bash>                            Shell template. [default: Bash]
  -f, --force                                   Force writing files. Overwrites files which already exist. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information
